fullText: [Music] sonosource is a company that was founded 13 years ago it's a geneva based company and what we do is clean code once you have clean code basically maintenance is easier you have less work in production you don't have to track security vulnerability so it's a lot of savings and it's a lot of risk mitigation for organizations so this is really the value of what we provide
